body:
]> 13/07/2026 7:28 Blizzard mode activated!.

The snowstorm continues at Perisher, dropping another 10cm of snow since yesterday to bring the snowstorm total to 25cm so far! See the snowstake here.

The blizzard like conditions that we saw yesterday will continue today with a top of 1 degrees, scattered snow showers, and strong winds. WNW winds are forecast to reach up to 43km/h with even stronger gusts, so be sure to rug up to avoid feeling that windchill.

Over the weekend, the Summit Quad Chair opened for the first time this season, as well as the Hume T-Bar at Smiggins. The team will continue to open more lifts and terrain as soon as conditions allow. Please note that high winds may impact lift operations again today, so be sure to download the Perisher App or keep an eye on the lift report for real-time updates.

Looking ahead, there is still more snow in the forecast for the coming days, so let's see what else Mother Nature delivers!

]]> weather-blank Kosciuszko Road: Chains are required between Prussian Creek and Perisher. There is slush on the road between Dainers Gap and Prussian Creek.

Guthega Road: Guthega Rd - There is slush on the road between Kosciusko Rd and the power station. Chains required from the power station to the village.

Alpine Way: Road open to Bullocks Flat, Skitube.

]]> Kosciuszko Road: Chains are required between Prussian Creek and Perisher. There is slush on the road between Dainers Gap and Prussian Creek.

]]> Guthega Road: Guthega Rd - There is slush on the road between Kosciusko Rd and the power station. Chains required from the power station to the village.

]]> 53.4 10 25 17 0 21 *Natural snow depth is supplemented with snowmaking in certain areas. Natural snow depth is measured at roughly 1,830m by Snowy Hydro Limited who have invested in new instrumentation across the Snowy Scheme and can now provide more frequent snow depth readings at a site close to the Spencers Creek snow course. This report reflects conditions at the date and time of this report. Conditions, lifts status and operations subsequent to this report may differ.
